rules: Never use Inter for H1 or H2.
Use tight tracking for headings larger than 24px.
Use relaxed leading for body text to improve readability.

primary.description: Deep Slate Blue - Used for primary actions, active states, and strong branding.

secondary.description: Soft Cool Gray - Used for secondary buttons, backgrounds of cards.

accent.description: Electric Blue - Used for CTAs, links, and focus states.

usage_rules: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Use the 'accent' color sparingly for high-priority actions.
Ensure text contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards.
Use 'muted-foreground' for secondary text to reduce visual noise.

textures: Subtle noise overlay on the dashboard background to reduce digital flatness.
Glassmorphism for sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b.

rules: Lists (like 'Upcoming Rotas') span 1 column and 2 rows.
Always use 'gap-6' for dashboard grids to allow breathing room.

page_structure.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8
page_structure.section: bg-card rounded-lg border shadow-sm p-6 mb-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_pills.confirmed: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-green-100 text-green-800 hover:bg-green-200
status_pills.pending: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 hover:bg-yellow-200
status_pills.declined: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-red-100 text-red-800 hover:bg-red-200

login_background.description: Live stream worship team context for login page background.

equipment_header.description: Mixing console close-up for equipment inventory section.

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'Calendar', 'Users', 'Settings', 'CheckSquare', 'Video', 'BarChart' as primary navigation icons.

rules: All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid'.
Ensure color contrast is at least 4.5:1 for normal text.
Focus states must be clearly visible with a ring offset.
Use semantic HTML (main, nav, aside, section) for structure.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Soft Utility' theme using the provided color palette in tailwind.config.js.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text. Import these fonts via Google Fonts in index.css.
Build the Dashboard using the 'Bento Grid' layout strategy.
Use Shadcn/ui components for complex interactions but style them to match the 'Soft Utility' theme (rounded corners, subtle shadows).
Ensure the 'My Rotas' page is mobile-responsive and easy to use on small screens.
Use the provided image URLs for the Login page and Equipment section.
Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic data related to church media (e.g., 'Sunday Service', 'Worship Night', 'Camera 1', 'Sound Board').
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, uniform styling).
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant emojis for icons.
